title: pinaropappus pooleanus
intro: Pinaropappus pooleanus, also known as Pinaropappus roseus, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pinaropappus pooleanus include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
